intent.viewer_goal: Understand how the attention formula turns token relationships into weighted value aggregation.
intent.target_audience: 机器学习方向研究生：见过 Transformer attention 公式，但还没有形成“Q/K/V 各自干什么、softmax 权重如何把 V 混成 context”的机制直觉。
intent.learning_objective: After watching, the viewer should be able to explain why QK^T creates relevance scores, why scaling is applied, why softmax creates weights, and how V is mixed into a contextual representation.

edges.reason: Similarity is computed between vector representations.
Raw relevance scores must become normalized weights.

just_in_time_insertions.one_sentence_explanation: 顺带一提，点积可以被当作两个向量朝向是否相似的快速打分。
顺带一提，softmax 会把一排分数变成总和为 1 的注意力比例。

script.style_guide: Geometric intuition explainer: precise, visual, calm, and just-in-time. Do not impersonate a specific creator.

beats.spoken_text: A token does not look at a sentence all at once. It asks a more local question: which other tokens matter to me right now?
beats.visual_need: tokens appear as tiles in a sentence strip

beats.spoken_text: For each token, we create three roles: a query that asks, keys that can answer, and values that carry the information to mix.
beats.visual_need: each token splits into Q, K, and V colored cards

beats.spoken_text: The query compares itself with every key. These comparisons become a grid of relevance scores.
beats.visual_need: QK^T heatmap emerges from query-key comparisons

beats.spoken_text: Dividing by the square root of the key dimension keeps the scores from becoming too extreme too early.
beats.visual_need: over-sharp heatmap calms into a readable score field

beats.spoken_text: Softmax turns those scores into attention weights: not just who is relevant, but how much each token contributes.
beats.visual_need: score bars normalize into weights that sum to one

beats.spoken_text: Finally, the weights mix the value vectors. The output is the same token, now carrying context from the tokens it attended to.
beats.visual_need: weighted value streams combine into one contextual vector

scenes.title: Tokens Ask For Context
scenes.high_level_visual: Sentence tokens become vector tiles; one token is highlighted as the current query.

scenes.title: Q K V Roles
scenes.high_level_visual: Each token splits into query, key, and value cards with stable colors.

scenes.title: Similarity Heatmap
scenes.high_level_visual: Query-key comparisons form a heatmap; scaling softens overconfident scores.

scenes.title: Softmax To Weights
scenes.high_level_visual: Raw score bars become normalized attention weights.

scenes.title: Weighted Values Become Context
scenes.high_level_visual: Weighted value streams merge into one contextual output vector.

scene_spec_contract.manifest_role: Project-level registry for intent, script, storyboard, artifact status, and website display.
scene_spec_contract.scene_spec_role: Scene-level single source of truth for Manim, TTS, Music/SFX, PixVerse, Assembly, and QA.

visual_asset_requests.prompt_intent: A cinematic metaphor clip where a highlighted token emits a soft spotlight across related token tiles.
visual_asset_requests.risk_note: No readable formulas; use as intro atmosphere only.

visual_asset_requests.prompt_intent: A smooth abstract transition from sharp glowing score spikes into a calm readable heatmap field.
visual_asset_requests.risk_note: Must not replace exact Manim heatmap; only transition around it.

visual_asset_requests.prompt_intent: A cinematic metaphor clip where multiple soft value streams converge into one calm contextual output.
visual_asset_requests.risk_note: No labels or formulas; Manim remains responsible for the exact weighted sum.

rhythm_map.reason: Viewer must see that QK^T is a table of pairwise relevance.
Scaling is easy to miss and should not be rushed.
Final weighted value aggregation is the conceptual payoff.

pixverse_jobs.prompt: A clean cinematic educational animation: glowing token tiles in a dark neutral space, one highlighted token emits a soft spotlight sweeping across related token tiles, slow camera push, elegant geometric motion, no readable text.
pixverse_jobs.negative_prompt: random equations, readable labels, distorted text, extra symbols, noisy background, fast chaotic motion, misleading math

pixverse_jobs.prompt: Abstract cinematic transition for an educational video: sharp glowing score peaks gradually cool into a smooth readable attention heatmap, dark neutral background, controlled slow motion, elegant light trails, no readable text.
pixverse_jobs.negative_prompt: random equations, readable labels, distorted text, extra symbols, noisy background, chaotic motion, incorrect math symbols

pixverse_jobs.prompt: Cinematic abstract educational animation: multiple soft colored streams converge into one calm glowing vector-like beam, dark neutral space, slow synthesis motion, no text, no symbols, no equations.
pixverse_jobs.negative_prompt: readable text, equations, random symbols, distorted labels, chaotic motion, noisy background

asset_manifest.usage: Person A source input for the attention demo.
Symbol ledger, causal steps, and misconception guardrails.
Exact formula and geometry render layer for all five scenes.
Low-quality transparent WebM scene layers exported by Person A.
Single-file low-quality Manim rough pass before PixVerse/audio assembly.
Text-free PNG inputs for PixVerse image-to-video jobs.
